heroEyebrow: Strategy x Systems x Scaled Execution
heroHeadline: Product Leader. Data Platforms & ML Systems.
heroSubheadline: Architecting intelligent systems from strategy to scale.
selectedImpactSubtext: Measured operating outcomes across platform strategy and execution.

proofMetrics.description: +8% CTR Lift ML modernization and model-serving improvements.
+12% Engagement Scaled experimentation across product surfaces.
$8M+ OPEX Reduced Platform consolidation and architecture simplification.

strategicPillars.headline: Strategy
strategicPillars.subheadline: I design decision systems, not feature roadmaps.
bullets: Tie AI capability to measurable business outcomes
Sequence platform investments against scale and governance constraints
Build business cases that unlock executive funding

strategicPillars.headline: Architecture
strategicPillars.subheadline: Platform choices are aligned to risk posture and execution cadence.
bullets: Define operating model boundaries before implementation
Surface system trade-offs early with cost and reliability framing
Standardize integration contracts to reduce delivery friction

customSections.body: I focus on systems that turn strategic intent into repeatable execution across product, data, and ML operations.
bullets: Architecture decisions grounded in business constraints
customSections.closingStatement: Clarity compounds when strategy and systems are designed together.
Learning is useful only when it improves decision quality in real systems.

credentials.appliedContext: Applied to platform strategy, model governance, and product operating cadence.
